series_metadata.series_title: Fiscal Year and Biennial Year Budget Materials
series_metadata.series_description: All materials used to construct and submit the legal departments budget for the fiscal and the biennial year.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 2 fiscal/biennal years then, destroy ; Electronic: Retain for 2 fiscal/biennal years then, destroy, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
